text:
Created attachment 224540
update to 1.0.1 + new maintainer

I've added another patch for updating the port and changing the maintainer to myself. Pick either one.

--cut--

security/luasec: update to 1.0.1

* update to 1.0.1
* new maintainer
* remove unused SLAVE_PORT
* strip library

ChangeLog:

  https://github.com/brunoos/luasec/blob/master/CHANGELOG

QA:

  * portlint: OK (looks fine)
  * testport: OK (poudriere: 11.4 i386/amd64, 12.2 i386/amd64,
    13.0 amd64/arm64, all flavors)
